title: [LTL][ImportVerilog] Add support for $sampled
body:
I've added support for lowering `$sampled` from assertion contexts into LTL. To do so, I've added a new operation, `ltl::SampledOp`.

The operation itself has largely been lifted from @fabianschuiki's [PR supporting `$sampled` in LowertoHW](https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/2549).

I've also made the result usable by Moore operations (e.g. outside of assertion contexts) using the type conversions from @TaoBi22's [PR doing the same for `$past`](https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/9621).

This PR continues my work in extending support for sampled value functions; see my [other PR supporting `$changed` in this pipeline](https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/9634), for instance.

I've also added a test for this in `builtins.sv`.

I don't have commit access so I'd appreciate help merging this! @Scheremo @fabianschuiki @TaoBi22
